title: ottelia scabra
intro: Ottelia scabra, also known as the rough-leaved water-plantain, is a perennial aquatic plant native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ottelia scabra include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
